response.justification: Candidate is an accomplished full-stack software craftsman with strong web, mobile, and backend experience, but the role requires deep hardware-software co-design expertise: SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator performance analysis, GPU/SIMD/MIMD architecture, and deep neural network optimization. The resume shows no experience in chip architecture, hardware modeling, performance engineering for AI accelerators, or low-level hardware optimization. Educational background (BS in CS) combined with software-only experience does not align with a Principal Performance Architect IC role focused on silicon.
strengths: Long track record (15+ years) as a senior/staff software engineer across diverse stacks
Some low-latency, high-throughput backend experience (Dunnhumby microservices handling millions of req/s)
Exposure to systems-level languages (C, C++, DLang) and embedded systems mentioned in summary
concerns: No SoC/IP modeling, hardware architecture, or chip design experience
No AI accelerator, GPU architecture, SIMD/MIMD, or deep-learning workload optimization background
Career trajectory is web/full-stack application development, not hardware-software co-design or performance architecture

key_factors.factor: No AI accelerator or DNN optimization experience
